schemaDescription: Operational profile extension for omnichannel personalization, predictive offers, and model outputs (supporter role, engagement channel, offer history, predictive scores). No client naming in AEP display titles.
fieldGroupDescription: Operational mixin for supporter intelligence and personalization signals.
tenantObjectDescription: Supporter intelligence attributes: role, channels, offers, predictive model outputs.

constituentRole.description: Relationship type: supporter vs info seeker.

primaryEngagementChannel.description: Preferred or dominant channel for personalization (email, sms, social, paid_media, web, etc.).

personalizationPriorityRank.description: Optional ranking from segmentation / orchestration for offer or journey prioritisation.

fundraisingEventInterestLevel.description: Inferred or stated interest in flagship fundraising events.

hasViewedFundraisingEventContent.description: Has viewed fundraising event content (supports predictive offer use cases).

hasCompletedFundraisingEventTransaction.description: Completed a related transaction; used to tune offer paths.

lastOfferCampaignCode.description: Code or ID of the last presented marketing offer campaign.

lastOfferPresentedAt.description: When the last offer was presented.

lastOfferAccepted.description: Whether the last presented offer was accepted / converted.

predictiveModelOutputs.description: Scores and metadata for next-best-action, churn, propensity, and related models.

modelBundleVersion.description: Version label for the packaged model outputs.

nextBestActionRecommendation.description: Recommended next best action key or label from modelling.

nextBestActionScore.description: Optional ranking score for the recommended action.

scoresComputedAt.description: When predictive scores were last computed.

personalizationSegmentCodes.description: Segment or audience codes for dynamic content.

useCaseCapabilityTags.description: Capability tags for governance (e.g. personalization, predictive_offers, modeling).
